title: Databricks Add-in for Excel support for all compliance security profile standards
body: The Databricks Add-in for Excel (Public Preview) now supports all compliance security profile standards supported by Databricks. For more, see [Compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) and [Connect to Databricks from Microsoft Excel](/aws/en/integrations/excel).

ref_links.text: Connect to Databricks from Microsoft Excel
